title: senecio fremontii var. blitoides
intro: Senecio fremontii var. blitoides, also known as Fremont's ragwort, is a perennial plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae). This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Fremont's ragwort include relief from digestive issues, such as diarrhea and constipation, as well as reduction of pain and inflammation. Fremont's ragwort can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used as a topical application for skin issues and wounds.
